code:
import string
import io

let line = io.read_line()
mut s: String = ""
match line
when Some(v)
  s = v
when None
  s = ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
mut product: Int = 1
mut i: Int = 0
let n = parts.len()
while i < n
  match parts.get(i)
  when Some(tok)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(x)
      product = product * x
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("product=#{product}")
